_description: Static — workflow graph for CodeScan. Each Core workflow has TWO diagrams: `mermaid` (high-level data/control flow) and `sourceMermaid` (the C# files & classes that implement it). The `file` field is informational — there is no canonical .md to open from the viewer; the source-files panel is the live reference instead.

workflows.label: Scan & Index Pipeline
workflows.description: scan / list command — traverses a project tree, extracts class:method definitions, comments, and dependency edges, enriches with git blame, and persists to SQLite with FTS5 + graph tables
workflows.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  U[codescan scan path] --> DS[DirectoryScanner]
  DS -->|file list| SA[SourceAnalyzer]
  DS -->|file list| CE[CommentExtractor]
  SA -->|methods| GB[GitBlameService]
  GB -->|author, date| ST[SqliteStore]
  CE -->|comments| ST
  SA -->|deps| SGA[SourceGraphAnalyzer]
  SGA -->|nodes + edges| ST
  ST -->|FTS5 + graph tables| DB[(~/.codescan/db/codescan.db)]
workflows.sourceMermaid:
flowchart TB subgraph Cmd[Commands/] LC[ListCommand.cs] end subgraph Svc[Services/] DS[DirectoryScanner.cs] SA[SourceAnalyzer.cs
facade since v1.2.0] CE[CommentExtractor.cs] SGA[SourceGraphAnalyzer.cs
facade since v1.2.0] GB[GitBlameService.cs] ST[SqliteStore.cs] end subgraph LA["Services/Analyzers/ — per-language since v1.2.0"] REG[LanguageAnalyzerRegistry.cs] HLP[AnalyzerHelpers.cs] L9["9 ILanguageAnalyzer impls:
CSharp · Java · Kotlin
JsTs · Php · Python
Go · Rust · Cpp"] end LC --> DS DS --> SA DS --> CE SA --> REG REG --> L9 L9 -.uses.-> HLP SA --> GB SGA --> REG CE --> ST SGA --> ST GB --> ST

workflows.label: Hybrid Search (FTS5 + git log)
workflows.description: search command combines indexed full-text search with live `git log --grep` results — covers both indexed content and commit-message context the index does not have
workflows.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  U[codescan search query] --> SC[SearchCommand]
  SC --> ST[SqliteStore.SearchFts5]
  SC --> GLS[GitLogSearchService]
  ST -->|FTS5 hits| MERGE[Merge + dedup]
  GLS -->|git log --grep matches| MERGE
  MERGE --> R[Ranked results]
workflows.sourceMermaid:
flowchart TB subgraph Cmd[Commands/] SC[SearchCommand.cs] end subgraph Svc[Services/] ST[SqliteStore.cs
FTS5 trigram tokenizer] GLS[GitLogSearchService.cs
subprocess git log --grep] end SC --> ST SC --> GLS

workflows.label: Cypher-like Graph Query
workflows.description: query / cypher / graph command — parses a safe MATCH/WHERE/LIMIT subset and runs it against the graph_nodes + graph_edges tables, returning a GraphData result the CLI/TUI/GUI all render
workflows.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  U["codescan query MATCH ..."] --> GQ[GraphQuery parser]
  GQ -->|pattern + filters| ST[SqliteStore.QueryGraph]
  ST -->|nodes + edges| GD[GraphData]
  GD --> CLI[CLI render]
  GD --> TUI[TUI render]
  GD --> GUI[GUI 2D/3D render]
workflows.sourceMermaid:
flowchart TB subgraph Cmd[Commands/] QC[QueryCommand.cs] end subgraph Svc[Services/] GQ[GraphQuery.cs
MATCH/WHERE/LIMIT parser] GM[GraphModels.cs
GraphData DTO] ST[SqliteStore.cs
graph_nodes + graph_edges] end QC --> GQ GQ --> ST ST --> GM

workflows.label: Interactive TUI
workflows.description: tui command — Terminal.Gui v2 (NetDriver) state machine. Project list → scan/search/graph screens, all reading from the same SqliteStore
workflows.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  U[codescan tui] --> APP[TuiApp]
  APP --> HOME[Home menu]
  HOME --> PRJ[Projects screen]
  HOME --> SCAN[Scan screen]
  HOME --> KW[Keyword search]
  HOME --> GR[Graph search]
  PRJ --> ST[(SqliteStore)]
  SCAN --> ST
  KW --> ST
  GR --> ST
workflows.sourceMermaid:
flowchart TB subgraph Tui[Tui/] TA[TuiApp.cs
state machine root] end subgraph Svc[Services/] ST[SqliteStore.cs] DS[DirectoryScanner.cs] SA[SourceAnalyzer.cs] end TA --> ST TA --> DS TA --> SA

workflows.label: Local Web GUI
workflows.description: gui start command — boots a local HTTP server (default port 8085), serves a static SPA, and exposes JSON endpoints over the same SqliteStore. Browser-side renders 2D and 3D graph views
workflows.mermaid:
flowchart LR U[codescan gui start --port 8085] --> SRV[HTTP server
127.0.0.1:8085] SRV -->|GET /| SPA[Static SPA] SPA -->|fetch /api/search| API[JSON API] SPA -->|fetch /api/graph| API SPA -->|fetch /api/query| API API --> ST[(SqliteStore)] SPA --> R2D[2D graph canvas] SPA --> R3D[3D graph view]
workflows.sourceMermaid:
flowchart TB
  subgraph Cmd[Commands/]
    GUI[GuiCommand.cs]
  end
  subgraph Svc[Services/]
    GS[GuiServer + handlers]
    ST[SqliteStore.cs]
  end
  GUI --> GS
  GS --> ST

workflows.label: Release Pipeline
workflows.description: version.txt → annotated git tag → release.yml matrix builds 4 native binaries with embedded SQLite native libs → CycloneDX SBOM + SHA256 checksums → GitHub Release publish → smoke test (--version + projects) guards every native-arch build
workflows.mermaid:
graph LR V[version.txt] --> T[git tag v*] T --> P[git push --tags] P --> GA[release.yml
matrix build] GA --> SBOM[CycloneDX SBOM] GA --> CK[SHA256 checksums.txt] GA --> SMK[CI smoke test
--version + projects] SMK --> REL[GitHub Release] SBOM --> REL CK --> REL
workflows.sourceMermaid:
flowchart TB subgraph Repo[Repo root] VT[version.txt] CSP[CodeScan.csproj
AutoBumpVersion target
SkipAutoBumpVersion gate] end subgraph CI[.github/workflows] REL[release.yml
tags v*] end CSP -.bumps.-> VT VT --> REL

workflows.label: Install Channels
workflows.description: Same GitHub Release feeds all install channels — winget (portable), Homebrew tap (psmon/homebrew-codescan), npm wrapper (@psmon/codescan-cli with postinstall download; bare codescan-cli is a third-party squat). Plus direct script installers (install-win.ps1 / install.sh) for environments without a package manager
workflows.mermaid:
flowchart LR REL[(GitHub Release v*)] --> WG[winget portable
microsoft/winget-pkgs PR] REL --> BR[Homebrew tap
psmon/homebrew-codescan] REL --> NP[npm postinstall
@psmon/codescan-cli] REL --> SW[install-win.ps1] REL --> SL[install.sh] WG -->|Windows x64| U1[User] BR -->|macOS arm64| U1 NP -->|Linux x64/arm64| U1 SW --> U1 SL --> U1
workflows.sourceMermaid:
flowchart TB subgraph Pkg[packaging/] WGM[winget/manifests/
p/psmon/CodeScan/] HB[homebrew/codescan.rb
+ update-formula.sh] NPM[npm/codescan-cli/
scripts/install.js] end subgraph Scr[Script/] SW[install-win.ps1] SL[install.sh] end subgraph CI[.github/workflows/release.yml] PW[publish-winget
if:false v1] PH[publish-homebrew
if:false v1] PN[publish-npm
if:false v1] end PW -.uses.-> WGM PH -.uses.-> HB PN -.uses.-> NPM
